content_body:
The cabin was everything we imagined and more.  Thanks for having everything so nice and accommodating.  We didn't need one thing while we were here.  Hopefully this will be an annual thing for us.  Thanks!

We had a wonderful time and I recommend Chef Douglas - he made us a wonderful dinner.  We most definitely will be back.  This was very relaxing and mind-clearing.  Two couples from Columbus, GA.
title: Married Couples Weekend in the North GA Mountains
